mapper.sql: tenant_id AS "tenantId", user_id AS "userId", session_id AS "sessionId", resume_id AS "resumeId", last_slots_json AS "lastSlotsJson", jobs_json AS "jobsJson", tool_events_json AS "toolEventsJson", resume_match_json AS "resumeMatchJson", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM chat_session_state WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND session_id=#{sessionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session_state(tenant_id,user_id,session_id,resume_id,last_slots_json,jobs_json,tool_events_json,resume_match_json,updated_at) VALUES(#{state.tenantId},#{state.userId},#{state.sessionId},#{state.resumeId},#{state.lastSlotsJson},#{state.jobsJson},#{state.toolEventsJson},#{state.resumeMatchJson},#{state.updatedAt}) ON CONFLICT (session_id) DO UPDATE SET resume_id=EXCLUDED.resume_id, last_slots_json=EXCLUDED.last_slots_json, jobs_json=EXCLUDED.jobs_json, tool_events_json=EXCLUDED.tool_events_json, resume_match_json=EXCLUDED.resume_match_json, updated_at=EXCLUDED.updated_at WHERE chat_session_state.tenant_id=EXCLUDED.tenant_id AND chat_session_state.user_id=EXCLUDED.user_id

INSERT INTO chat_message_log(tenant_id,user_id,session_id,turn_id,role,content,metadata_json,created_at) VALUES(#{tenantId},#{userId},#{sessionId},#{turnId},'user',#{content},#{metadataJson},#{createdAt}) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id,user_id,session_id,turn_id) WHERE role='user' AND turn_id IS NOT NULL DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT content FROM chat_message_log WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND session_id=#{sessionId} AND turn_id=#{turnId} AND role='user' LIMIT 1

SELECT id,metadata_json AS "metadataJson" FROM chat_message_log WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND session_id=#{sessionId} AND role='assistant' AND metadata_json LIKE '%jobCards%' ORDER BY created_at DESC,id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message_log SET metadata_json=#{metadataJson} WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT s.session_id AS "sessionId",s.resume_id AS "resumeId",s.updated_at AS "updatedAt", (SELECT content FROM chat_message_log m WHERE m.tenant_id=s.tenant_id AND m.user_id=s.user_id AND m.session_id=s.session_id ORDER BY m.created_at,m.id LIMIT 1) AS "firstMessage" FROM chat_session_state s WHERE s.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND s.user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY s.updated_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT id,turn_id AS "turnId",role,content,metadata_json AS "metadataJson",created_at AS "createdAt" FROM chat_message_log WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND session_id=#{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at,id
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_message_log WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND session_id=#{sessionId}
DELETE FROM chat_session_state WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND session_id=#{sessionId}
